_fixture: WS2 fresh-clone smoke — POSITIVE-assertion canary policy (AC-WS2-2).
_purpose: Proves the tool-policy guard loaded ITS OWN policy from the planted clone, not the author's /root policy and not a different guard. The dev role denies any write whose path contains the unique token {{CANARY_TOKEN}}. The smoke substitutes {{CANARY_TOKEN}} with a per-run random token, then asks the tool-policy hook to authorize a Write to a path bearing that token. A correct guard blocks (exit 2) and its deny_reason echoes the token, so a block-by-the-WRONG-guard (intended guard silently failed open while a different guard blocked) is detectable: the wrong guard's reason would not reference {{CANARY_TOKEN}}.
_contract: denied_write_path_prefixes uses a leading-* glob so the policy_registry _glob_match path (fnmatch against the canonical absolute target) fires for any absolute path containing the token, independent of the clone's install location.

dev.rationale: Canary: writes touching the unique smoke token are denied so the smoke can prove the guard read THIS policy.
